Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: dan
Message:
fix: update scenario schema to use expected_output with actual golden data

Changed schema from:
  {id, input, expected_behavior, golden_reference}
to:
  {id, input, expected_behavior, expected_output}

expected_output now contains the actual golden outputs:
- Headline extraction: dict with extracted stories JSON
- Interpretation: list of 5 Q&A objects (or null if no golden ref)
- Daily summary: prose summary text

This allows gavel-ai judges to properly compare model outputs against
the actual golden data for accurate quality assessment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: update scenario schema to use expected_output with actual golden data

Changed schema from:
  {id, input, expected_behavior, golden_reference}
to:
  {id, input, expected_behavior, expected_output}

expected_output now contains the actual golden outputs:
- Headline extraction: dict with extracted stories JSON
- Interpretation: list of 5 Q&A objects (or null if no golden ref)
- Daily summary: prose summary text

This allows gavel-ai judges to properly compare model outputs against
the actual golden data for accurate quality assessment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
